system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_rpm_plan_confirm","body":"
CREATE PROC TR_RPM_PLAN_CONFIRM
(
	@xuong nvarchar(50),
	@madonhang nvarchar(200),
	@masp nvarchar(200),
	@trangthai nvarchar(5)
)
AS
SELECT a.xuong, a.madonhang, a.masp, b.tensp
	, a.mps_confirm
	, FORMAT(a.ngaythang, 'yyyy-MM') as ngaythang
	, c.order_qty
	, SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong_kehoach
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=1 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D1
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=2 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D2
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=3 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D3
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=4 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D4
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=5 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D5
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=6 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D6
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=7 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D7
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=8 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D8
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=9 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D9
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=10 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D10
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=11 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D11
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=12 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D12
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=13 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D13
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=14 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D14
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=15 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D15
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=16 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D16
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=17 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D17
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=18 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D18
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=19 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D19
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=20 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D20
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=21 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D21
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=22 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D22
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=23 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D23
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=24 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D24
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=25 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D25
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=26 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D26
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=27 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D27
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=28 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D28
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=29 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D29
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=30 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D30
	, SUM(CASE WHEN DAY(a.ngaythang)=31 THEN a.soluong ELSE 0 END) AS D31
FROM tr_rpm_plan a LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham b ON a.masp = b.masp
	LEFT JOIN tr_order_detail c ON a.madonhang = c.order_number AND a.masp = c.item_number
WHERE c.choduyet = 1
	AND c.f_cancelled = 'N'
	AND c.Finished = 0
	AND a.xuong LIKE @xuong
	AND a.madonhang LIKE @madonhang
	AND a.masp LIKE @masp
	AND a.mps_confirm LIKE @trangthai
GROUP BY a.xuong, a.madonhang, a.masp, b.tensp
	, a.mps_confirm, FORMAT(a.ngaythang, 'yyyy-MM'), c.order_qty
ORDER BY a.xuong, FORMAT(a.ngaythang, 'yyyy-MM'), a.madonhang, a.masp","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_rpm_plan","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
